textByHashes.21bf80632688662f94586b12bc0105861f5bff5e: You are not part of us. Leave us alone.
textByHashes.0faa3cc6a195ad5994cfaa400fe4849a7059fbdd: Board the boat and we shall depart.
textByHashes.35cc8e8e185eabd910493ee8e3ce623da8906aa9: Business here is complete. Do you wish to return to the dry land?
textByHashes.16483b53765a13214d436199c9d8ba2c390c7009: Then stay if that is your wish.
